things.name: White Tower
things.description: Iconic 15th-century Ottoman tower and symbol of Thessaloniki on the seafront promenade

things.name: Archaeological Museum
things.description: Outstanding collection of Macedonian gold including the treasures of Philip II of Macedon

things.name: Ano Poli (Upper Town)
things.description: Byzantine walled upper town with timber-framed houses and the Eptapyrgio fortress

things.name: Rotunda
things.description: Magnificent 4th-century Roman mausoleum converted to a church with extraordinary mosaics

things.name: Byzantine Museum
things.description: Exceptional collection of Byzantine icons, relics and ecclesiastical treasures

things.name: Aristotelous Square
things.description: Grand colonnaded seafront square and the social heart of the city

things.name: Roman Forum (Ancient Agora)
things.description: Excavated Roman forum with the remains of baths and an odeon in the city centre

things.name: Modiano & Kapani Markets
things.description: Historic covered markets brimming with spices, olives, fish and Thessaloniki's food culture

things.name: Thessaloniki Waterfront
things.description: Elegant 3km seafront promenade with sculptures, cafes and sunset views

things.name: Ladadika
things.description: Former Jewish commercial district now a lively neighbourhood of tavernas and music venues
